charity.focus: STEM education, workforce readiness, community development

environment.s: air pollution violation: $1.8B in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

wiki.extract: Toyota Motor Sales, USA, Inc. is the North American Toyota sales, marketing, and distribution subsidiary devoted to the United States market. Founded in 1957 in California, TMS currently employs more than 6,500 people. As of spring 2017 Toyota moved to a new campus in Plano, Texas. Construction of this new facility began in the fall of 2014, and is located at the corner of Texas State Highway 121 and Legacy Drive, across the street from the FedEx Office Headquarters, and the J. C. Penney World Headquarters. The former location of Toyota's headquarters was Torrance, California, where they super

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: Two employees were moving cars on the lot when a car ran over the injured employee's foot. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.employer: Sterling McCall Toyota Fort Bend Collision Center
sampleRecords.nature: Cuts, lacerations, punctures without injury to internal structures
sampleRecords.event_description: Walked or ran into stationary object
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was preparing a vehicle outside of the paint booth and when he turned and his right eyelid was caught by the parts hanger. He sustained a laceration to the top of his eyelid.

An employee was lining up a hydraulic attachment cylinder while installing a fork positioner on a forklift when they suffered crush injuries to two fingers on their left hand, including a partial amputation of the middle finger.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was sliding an item from a rack onto a dolly. The dolly's gate was still up, so the item could not be pulled onto the dolly. As the employee was lowering the gate with their right hand, their left middle fingertip was caught between the item and the dolly handle. The fingertip was amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was putting a tool into the jobsite box. When he went to shut the lid, it fell on his right middle and ring fingers and amputated the middle fingertip.
